scenario_description: A multi-turn sequence tracking four models and their colored feather fans through a parade, a solo shot, and a fan exchange.

turns.text: Check out this parade lineup. Four models walking in a row holding giant feather fans.
turns.image_description: A wide shot of a street parade. From left to right: Model A (tall, blonde) holds a large Red feather fan. Model B (short, dark hair) holds a large Blue feather fan. Model C (medium height, curly hair) holds a large Green feather fan. Model D (petite, red hair) holds a large Yellow feather fan. All are wearing matching white outfits.

turns.text: That's a vibrant lineup! The colors really pop against the white outfits. Who is your favorite so far?
Here's a close-up of the one with the blue fan from before. Looks like she put it away.
turns.image_description: A medium close-up portrait of Model B (short, dark hair). She is no longer holding a fan. Instead, she is wearing a bright blue fabric headband that matches the color of the Blue fan seen in the previous image. Her expression is smiling.

turns.text: Nice detail on the headband! It definitely ties back to her original accessory. Did anyone else change up their look?
Yeah, check this out. Someone is holding the red fan now.
turns.image_description: A medium shot focusing on Model D (petite, red hair), who originally held the Yellow fan. She is now holding the large Red feather fan. The background is blurred but shows the same street setting.

turns.text: Wait, really? That's interesting. I didn't expect that swap. So the red fan has moved hands?

Based on everything we've seen, which model is currently holding the red fan? A) The one who started with the blue fan. B) The one who started with the yellow fan. C) The one who started with the green fan. D) The one who started with the red fan.

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 establishes the initial state: Model D holds the Yellow fan, and Model A holds the Red fan. Turn 2 focuses on Model B (Blue fan) but does not involve the Red fan. Turn 3 explicitly shows Model D (the one who started with the Yellow fan) holding the Red fan. Therefore, the model currently holding the red fan is the one who started with the yellow fan.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: The model must track the identity of the person holding the Yellow fan in Turn 1 and recognize that specific individual in Turn 3 despite them holding a different object (Red fan). A model relying only on Turn 3 might guess based on visual similarity or assume the original owner still has it without cross-referencing Turn 1.

_meta.scenario: Turn one shows a parade of four models, each carrying a large, colorful feather fan (Red, Blue, Green, Yellow). Turn two isolates the model with the Blue fan, who has now put it away and is wearing a matching blue headband. Turn three shows the Red fan being held by the model who originally carried the Yellow fan.
